commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `chatgpt_image` MCP tool, adds image output fields to `consult`, returns artifact/image summaries, and updates MCP/browser docs and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows MCP path inputs are forwarded to browser image run options, and current main writes downloaded bytes to the resolved output path. I did not run a live ChatGPT browser image smoke.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A maintainer/security decision is needed on whether MCP callers may choose local output paths; contributor-side live proof is also required and cannot be supplied by an automated repair.

target.title: [codex] Make ChatGPT image generation easy for MCP agents
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a dedicated `chatgpt_image` MCP tool that wraps ChatGPT browser image generation with a small agent-friendly input shape.
- Add `generateImage` and `outputPath` to the general `consult` tool so advanced callers can still trigger the CLI `--generate-image` image-aware wait/download path directly.
- Return saved session artifacts, including a convenience `images` array with paths and ChatGPT file metadata, in structured MCP output.
- Document the new agent image workflow in MCP/browser docs, README, and changelog.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/mcp*.test.ts tests/mcp/**/*.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/mcp/chatgptImage.test.ts tests/mcp/utils.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check CHANGELOG.md README.md docs/browser-mode.md docs/mcp.md src/mcp/server.ts src/mcp/tools/consult.ts src/mcp/tools/chatgptImage.ts src/mcp/types.ts src/mcp/utils.ts tests/mcp/chatgptImage.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts tests/mcp/utils.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/mcp/server.ts src/mcp/tools/consult.ts src/mcp/tools/chatgptImage.ts src/mcp/types.ts src/mcp/utils.ts tests/mcp/chatgptImage.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts tests/mcp/utils.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec tsgo --noEmit` fails on existing repo-wide issues unrelated to this patch: `scripts/check.ts` Bun/esbuild target typing and `tests/browser/chatgptImages.test.ts` fetch mock typing under Node 26.
target.author: umutkeltek
